meaning: adv.嘲弄地,半开玩笑地,戏谑地
examples: "Carnival ritual" is the main ritual of carnival, which is "Putting on crown and taking off crown banteringly ".
So while Rudd and Rogen bantered banteringly in the background, all I could picture were Walter White (Bryan Cranston) and Jesse Pinkman (Aaron Paul) arguing over the money, meth, and chemistry.
